name: tokenomics-soundcheck
description: Tokenomics Soundcheck — design token economies that don't fuel their own collapse, and stress-test them before launch. Catches death-spiral (reflexive collapse) and economic-attack risk: 15 anti-patterns from 50+ collapse post-mortems, a measurable scorecard + cost-of-corruption security panel, a survivor control group, out-of-sample validation, 16 positive design patterns, 8 archetype playbooks, and a bundled stdlib-only stress-runner. Research/design reference, not investment advice.
